beforeSubmitPrompt.description: Detect secrets in prompts (sk-, ghp_, AKIA, Slack tokens, private keys) before submission

beforeReadFile.description: Warn when reading sensitive files (.env, .key, .pem, credentials, secret)

beforeShellExecution.description: Block git --no-verify / --no-gpg-sign hook-bypass flags to protect pre-commit, commit-msg, pre-push hooks
